name: voice-insurance-claims-agent
description: Voice-based insurance claims intake agent using Gemini Live API

scripts.migrate: node -e "const pool=require('./src/db/pool.js');const fs=require('fs');(async()=>{const files=fs.readdirSync('./migrations').sort();for(const f of files){console.log('Running '+f);await pool.query(fs.readFileSync('./migrations/'+f,'utf8'));}console.log('All migrations complete');process.exit(0)})().catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1)})"
